sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, name String, description String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello', 'This is a test string'), (2, 'test@example.com', 'Email format string'), (3, '12345', 'Numeric string'), (4, '', 'Empty string'), (5, NULL, 'NULL string');
SELECT id, name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE description ILIKE '%' || name || '%') AS match_count FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, name, length(description) AS desc_length FROM test_strings GROUP BY id, name HAVING desc_length > 5;
SELECT id, (tuple(name, description)) AS string_tuple FROM test_strings WHERE (tuple(name, description)) ILIKE tuple('hello', 'test string');
CREATE TABLE temp_strings AS SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT DISTINCT id, (SELECT count() FROM temp_strings WHERE description ILIKE '%string%') AS desc_match FROM temp_strings GROUP BY id having desc_match > 0;
SELECT id, (tuple(name, (CASE WHEN description IS NULL THEN 'No Description' ELSE description END))) AS checks FROM test_strings WHERE checks.2 ILIKE '%test%';
SELECT name, toLastDayOfMonth(created_at) AS month_period FROM test_strings GROUP BY month_period ORDER BY month_period DESC;
SELECT id, (tuple(ifNull(name, 'Unknown'), ifNull(description, 'N/A'))) ILIKE tuple('unknown', 'n/a') AS is_empty FROM test_strings WHERE is_empty = 1;
